case_title: INDERPAL M. SINGH VS. SUNG HEI TEDWIN CHIANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGH, INDERPAL M. . TRUSTEE OF THE SINGH & CHEUNG FAMILY TRUST DATED SEPTEMBER 17, 2019 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIANG, SUNG HEI TEDWIN FU, JIA XIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1920 OCEAN AVENUE, #3C, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70144065) (TRANSACTION ID # 70144065)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70126206) AS TO DEFENDANT CHIANG, SUNG HEI TEDWIN FU, JIA XIN
